title: DCSync: Directory Replication from Non-Domain Controller
description: Detects directory replication requests (Event 4662) with DS-Replication-Get-Changes GUIDs from non-machine accounts — classic DCSync attack via mimikatz lsadump::dcsync.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4662' and not (User like '*$') | stats count as Requests by User, Entity | sort -Requests
